---
title: "Experimental notebook"
format: html
comments:
  hypothesis: true
---

This is an experimental notebook

```{r}
# This is a code cell
library(MASS)
```

We're going to do some stuff

```{r}
x <- runif(100)
y <- runif(100)

plot(
  x,
  y,
  xlab = "A variable",
  ylab = "Another variable"
)
```
